text: The juxtaposition of sterile glass walls and vivid, idea-filled displays fills me with a sense of transition—moving from the orderly, almost clinical domain of function into the vibrant, creative sphere of inquiry. I am poised between anticipation and reflection, sensing an invitation to engage deeply with the ideas unfolding before me. Here, I feel like a participant in the ongoing dance between knowledge and imagination, aware of the invisible boundaries between observer and creator.
